name: "Sub-Feature Enhancement"

labels: "enhancement, sub-feature"
---

## Enhancement: {module} / {nn}_{name} — {what you're changing}

**Module:** `{nn}_{module}`
**Sub-feature:** `{nn}_{name}`
**Owner:** @your-github-username

---

## Scope Lock

> **Define exactly what this enhancement does and does NOT do.**
> If you find yourself adding more items, STOP. Open a new issue instead.

### What this changes
- [ ] {Specific change 1}
- [ ] {Specific change 2}

### What this does NOT change
- {Related thing that stays as-is}
- {Thing that tempts you but belongs in a separate issue}

### Done when
- [ ] {Testable outcome 1}
- [ ] {Testable outcome 2}

---

## Progress

- [ ] Existing docs read (scope, design, architecture, API contract)
- [ ] `08_worklog.md` entry written
- [ ] Database changes planned (or confirmed: none)
- [ ] Migration verified locally (or N/A)
- [ ] Cross-module impact checked (or confirmed: none)
- [ ] Tests written (RED)
- [ ] Implementation done (GREEN)
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] PR opened with rollback plan
- [ ] PR merged

> Discoveries go here as new issues, NOT added to this enhancement.
